channel.title: arduino on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in arduino on SoundsBrown

item.title: RC filters and PWM
item.description: References: - http://sim.okawa-denshi.jp/en/PWMtool.php - https://playground.arduino.cc/Code/PwmFrequency/ - https://www.arduino.cc/en/Tutorial/SecretsOfArduinoPWM PWM base frequency: - Pins 5 and 6: 62500 Hz - Pins 3, 9, 10, and 11 is 31250 Hz - Prescaler defaults to 64, resulting in default PWM rates of approximately 976 Hz and 488 Hz - Changing the prescaler allows higher PWM rates, but may affect the behavior of micros(), delay(), et al. This was not a problem when tested on pin 9, though.
